summary: Iteration 80 - Frontend-only testing for light mode enforcement, dark mode toggle removal, and UI visibility fixes. All 13 features verified successfully via Playwright UI tests on mobile viewport (390x844).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 features verified on mobile viewport (390x844): 1) HowItWorksPage step headers have WHITE backgrounds with coloured left border (bg-white border-l-4) - NOT full coloured backgrounds, 2) HowItWorksPage images load from /images/howto/ directory (7 images found), 3) HowItWorksPage has NO dark mode toggle (moon icon) in header, 4) HowItWorksPage has NO 'Report Snapshot' preview cards, 5) HowItWorksPage caption text under images has text-xs class (small), 6) LandingPage has NO Report Snapshot cards, 7) LandingPage has NO dark mode toggle in header, 8) LawyerDirectory has NO dark mode toggle in header, 9) LawyerDirectory has NO 'Prepare Before You Meet a Lawyer' CTA section, 10) SuccessStories footer CTA has text-slate-900 heading and text-slate-700 body (visible), 11) SuccessStories 'Share My Story' button has landing-cta-primary class (visible), 12) PageCTA inline variant has bg-blue-50 background with text-slate-900 heading and visible 'Get Started Free' button, 13) CaseDetail AI Progress Analysis button uses bg-blue-600 (solid, not gradient).
